information.title: Company notices, vacancies, procurement updates, and tender information.
information.summary: Select a category below for the latest public information from Aja Alloys. Published items can later be added here as formal notices, vacancy announcements, or procurement updates.

categories.label: News
categories.title: News
categories.summary: Company updates, public notices, operational announcements, and general information will be published in this category.
